Friends of the Institute

An eclectic group of people who provide advice, mentoring, support, and guidance for the Institute and its denizens. The actual list should appear on this page soon pending final "approval." If you are willing and extraordinarily capable of supporting the Institute in some way please contact Lalaine Pedron.
